expectations.text: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::TextMessageStartEvent, TextMessageContentEvent, and TextMessageEndEvent with matching message_id
expectations.evidence: All three events used with same message_id variable: TextMessageStartEvent, TextMessageContentEvent(delta: 'Hello, World!'), TextMessageEndEvent

expectations.evidence: Output line: 'AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::RunFinishedEvent.new(thread_id: thread_id, run_id: run_id, result: {})' appears after all message events

expectations.text: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events and writes them to a stream
expectations.evidence: Output uses 'AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder.new', 'encoder.encode(...)', and 'stream.flush if stream.respond_to?(:flush)' after each write

eval_feedback.overall: Correct implementation following the skill's guidance. Uses proper event order, encoder, and flush pattern.
